title: Deduction questions D1-D10
description: How to complete deduction questions D1 to D10 in your paper tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, tax return, 2024, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

child_links.title: D1 Work-related car expenses 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D1 if you incurred car expenses as an employee for a car you owned, leased or hired.

child_links.title: D2 Work-related travel expenses 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D2 if you incurred travel expenses in the course of performing your work as an employee.

child_links.title: D3 Work-related clothing, laundry and dry-cleaning expenses 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D3 if as an employee you incurred work-related clothing, laundry and dry-cleaning expenses.

child_links.title: D4 Work-related self-education expenses 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D4 to claim self-education expenses that relate to your work as an employee.

child_links.title: D5 Other work-related expenses 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D5 to claim any other work-related expenses you incurred as an employee and have not already claimed.

child_links.title: D6 Low-value pool deduction 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D6 to claim a deduction for the decline in value of low-cost and low-value assets.

child_links.title: D7 Interest deductions 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D7 to claim interest expenses incurred from interest income you have declared at question 10.

child_links.title: D8 Dividend deductions 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D8 to claim expenses you incurred from dividend and distribution income you declared at question 11.

child_links.title: D9 Gifts or donations 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D9 to claim a deduction for gifts or donations you made.

child_links.title: D10 Cost of managing tax affairs 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D10 if you incurred expenses in managing your tax affairs.

child_links.title: Deductions in the supplementary tax return 2024
child_links.description: Complete question D if you claimed a deduction in the supplementary section in your tax return.

child_links.title: Total deductions 2024
child_links.description: Complete the total deductions section of your tax return.

child_links.title: Subtotal 2024
child_links.description: Complete the subtotal section in your tax return.
